title: boehmeria platyphylla var. celebica
intro: Boehmeria platyphylla var. celebica is a variety of the Boehmeria platyphylla plant, a type of nettle tree native to Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Boehmeria platyphylla var. celebica include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, or it is made into a tincture or capsule for easier consumption.
